name: Peach Breakfast Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl or food processor, beat together butter, sugar, orange peel, and almond extract until well blended.
2. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
3. Stir in flour until the batter is smooth.
4. Spread the batter evenly into a 9-inch cheesecake pan that has been greased and floured with a removable rim.
5. Peel the peaches and slice them as desired; arrange over the batter.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 25-30 minutes, or until lightly browned and beginning to pull away from the sides of the pan.
7. Remove from the oven and carefully spread sour cream topping evenly over the fruit using a wet spatula or spoon.
8. Return the pan to the oven and bake an additional 10 minutes.
9. Allow to cool on a rack for at least 30 minutes before serving warm or cooled. If making ahead, allow to cool completely, cover, and refrigerate up to 8 hours; then run a knife around the rim of the pan to loosen the cake, remove the rim, and serve on a platter. Sprinkle with cinnamon sugar if desired.
